title: LEGO DC Batman: Batman Tumbler vs. Two-Face & The Joker - Batmobile Car Toy with 3 Minifigures - Super Hero Set - Gift for 8 Plus Year Old Boys, Girls and Dark Knight Fans 76303
features: Batman vehicle toy – Put the Batmobile from the Dark Knight films into kids’ hands with this LEGO building toy set for 8+ year old boys and girls
Batman Tumbler – The Batmobile toy car has a flame element attached to the exhaust pipe and opens to reveal an instrument panel and minifigure cockpit
DC Super Heroes – Includes a LEGO Batman minifigure with his Batarang, The Joker holding a wad of cash, and Two-Face with his trademark silver coin
Rotatable Bat-Signal toy – The Bat-Signal projector (does not light up) that kids use to summon Batman tilts and turns 360 degrees in both directions
Batman gift for kids – This LEGO DC set featuring the iconic tumbler from the Dark Knight Trilogy makes a great gift for 8+ year old boys and girls
3D building instructions – Kids can download the LEGO Builder app for digital tools to zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress
LEGO DC toys – The extensive range of LEGO DC building sets is designed to deliver endless imaginative build-and-play possibilities for kids who enjoy super-hero role play
description: From the manufacturer Super Hero action with the Tumbler Batmobile Treat fans of the Dark Knight films and cool vehicles to this Batman playset featuring the iconic Tumbler Batmobile. Authentic Batman adventures The Tumbler has a flame attached to the exhaust pipe and opens to reveal an instrument panel and cockpit for the minifigure. LEGO DC Batman: Batman Tumbler vs. Two-Face & The Joker Batman sits in the Tumbler Open the Tumbler to reveal an instrument panel and cockpit. Position the Bat-Signal Tilt and turn the Bat-Signal to summon Batman. Batman, The Joker, Two-Face Cool accessories include the Batarang, cash and a coin. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Get more DC Super Heroes action Check out other LEGO DC sets in the range (sold separately) for even more creative adventures for kids to explore.

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
